notes: Zuhr Jamaat 12:40pm. Jumu'ah at 12:30pm & 1:40pm. Eid Salaah 7:30am & 9:00am. Last ten nights Qiyam-ul-Layl at midnight. Fidya/Kaffarah £1.50 per fast. Pay your Zakat - 100% of all Zakat funds will be distributed to the needy. Bank Transfer: Lloyds Bank, S/C: 30-93-09, A/C: 01195888. Please mention Zakat, Sadaqah, Lillah or Fitrana/Fidya in your payment reference. Taraweeh recitation of Surah/Ayah listed per night.
